case_title: HOP NERN YU VS. WILBUR CHIN et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,100.00 FILED BY YU, HOP NERN AS TO DEFENDANT CHIN, WILBUR CHIN, NANCY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-04-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF YU, HOP NERN
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF YU, HOP NERN AS TO DEFENDANT CHIN, WILBUR CHIN, NANCY
ORDER RECALLING WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY TIME PAYMENT GRANTED IN COURT AS TO DEFENDANT CHIN, WILBUR CHIN, NANCY
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF YU, HOP NERN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NONE GIVEN) SERVED MAR-14-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHIN, WILBUR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NONE GIVEN) SERVED MAR-14-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHIN, NANCY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YU, HOP NERN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHIN, WILBUR CHIN, NANCY $5,100.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,100.00, DEFENDANTS TO MAKE PAYMENT IN ONE LUMP SUM OR DEFENDANT MAY PAY AT $200 PER MONTH. IF DEFENDANTS DOES NOT PAY IN A LUMP SUM, THE JUDGMENT AMOUNT WILL EARN INTEREST @ 10% PER YEAR UNTIL PAID IN FULL. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $200.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON MAY-01-2012 AND ON THE 1ST DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED - ORDER TO RECALL WRITT GRANTED A TIME PAYMENT PLAN - PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL - AS TO DEFENDANT CHIN, WILBUR CHIN, NANCY
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE MARK MURRAY FILED BY YU, HOP NERN CHIN, WILBUR CHIN, NANCY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-04-2012 - JUDGMENT.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $43.09 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT CHIN, WILBUR CHIN, NANCY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-04-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-04-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT AND REPRESENTED BY AMY LO-CANTONESE INTERPRETER. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK MURRAY. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
